Who I Am

Not just a manager.
An architect who executes.

Most OBMs manage people and processes. I design and build the systems that power them: dashboards, automations, CRM pipelines, recruitment engines, and AI workflows. Currently OBM for two active agencies simultaneously.

Systems Design & Automation
End-to-end automation pipelines using n8n, GHL, Airtable, and AI — built from scratch, not stitched together.
Recruitment Infrastructure
Google Forms with Apps Script backends — application scoring, automated response emails, and interview scheduling at scale.
Analytics & Reporting Dashboards
Real-time dashboards tracking call performance, VA productivity, client payments, and task completion rates.
Client Onboarding Systems
Full onboarding infrastructure — CRM pipelines, Calendly webhooks, alert systems, and VA matching flows.

OBM & Technical Lead
Favour's Control Panel: Custom React Application
mavenaide.app / pipeline

Client acquisition kanban: Discovery Scheduled → VA Selected, built from scratch in React with live pipeline counts per stage

mavenaide.app / alerts

Intelligent alerts — auto-detects action items: contracts to send, kickoffs pending, proposals to follow up

mavenaide.app / vas

VA database with specializations, tools, and capacity slots — instant client-to-VA matching

VA Productivity & Performance: Airtable Dashboards
airtable.com / MavenAide — VA Productivity Dashboard

Monthly VA productivity overview — 441 tasks, 1,209 hours logged, 101% completion rate, 9.47 average client satisfaction

airtable.com / task-distribution

Routine task distribution by VA service category — admin, social media, lead gen, project management

airtable.com / va-tracking

Per-VA monthly tracking with daily report breakdown, task completion rates, and daily accomplishment logs

Recruitment Infrastructure: Google Forms & Apps Script Automations
docs.google.com / forms — Recruitment Suite

9+ branded recruitment forms — Real Estate VA, Marketing VA, Social Media, General VA, CRM Ops, IT Specialist, and more

drive.google.com / forms & response sheets

Every form paired with a response sheet — Apps Script handles scoring, shortlisting, and automated interview emails

GoToCalls Central Hub: Single Source of Truth for the Entire Team
airtable.com / GoToCalls — Central Hub

All client dashboards, EVA profiles, SOPs, video training guides, and client-specific interfaces — structured in one page, accessible by every team member at any time

Call Centre Analytics: Airtable Dashboards
airtable.com / GoToCalls — All Call Analytics

15,408 calls tracked — 81.7% answer rate, 88h 46m total phone time, full status and duration breakdowns

airtable.com / call-log-detail

Granular call log — contact-level records with duration, agent, and reporting period tags

airtable.com / eva-payments

EVA payment tracking — $14,351 processed, zero outstanding, payments-over-time trend

Project & Client Reporting: Airtable Dashboards
airtable.com / project-report

15 projects tracked with status, EVA assignments, hours worked, and estimated cost per project

airtable.com / client-monthly-summary

Client monthly summary — 391 hours tracked, hour limits, differentials, and EVA breakdown

The Flagship Offer

VA Agency Launchpad

Fixed-Scope Engagement

Your complete agency backend: built, tested & handed over.

New or scaling VA agency founders hire me to build everything on the operations side in 4–6 weeks. You focus on clients and sales. I build the machine that supports it all.

⏱ 4–6 weeks · Deliverable-based · Not a retainer
  • ✦
    Recruitment Pipeline — Branded forms, Apps Script scoring, automated shortlisting & interview emails
  • ✦
    Client Onboarding System — CRM, Calendly integration, welcome flows, alert panel
  • ✦
    CRM Setup — Airtable or GHL configured for your exact workflow
  • ✦
    Performance Dashboard — Real-time VA productivity and client analytics
  • ✦
    Central Operations Hub — SOPs, training materials, dashboards, all in one structured page
  • ✦
    AI-Powered Workflows — Email routing, classification, or qualification bots as needed
